entries.message: KingbaseES credentials normalize additively with port 54321 and explicit schema.
URL uses kingbase+ksycopg2 and SQLAlchemy redacts the password.
Connection timeout and SSL mode remain isolated connect_args.
Engine options preserve the base short-lived engine contract after the runtime gate.
Statement timeout is parameterized and transaction-local by design.
search_path uses a bound parameter; schema text is not concatenated into SQL.
Empty schema leaves the server search_path unchanged.
MySQL, PostgreSQL, and DM8 default ports and URL drivers are unchanged.
The unchanged shared validator accepts SELECT and blocks representative unsafe SQL.
Provider declares KingbaseES as Preview and exposes optional schema without changing Tool inputs.
KingbaseES runtime is unavailable. Install the approved Linux amd64 ksycopg2 driver and native client libraries.
